disclaimer: Regulatory deadlines change. This profile is human-curated with cited sources and is a STARTING POINT for planning, not legal advice. Validate against your current obligations before relying on it, and override the deadlines with your own where you have authoritative dates.
update_process: See UPDATING_REGULATORY.md. Re-verify each source, edit this file, bump `as_of` and `review_due`, open a PR; CI deploys.

mandates.authority: US NIST — IR 8547 (Transition to PQC Standards)

standards.added_2025: HQC selected as the fifth (non-lattice) algorithm; draft standard 2026

threat_context.rsa2048_qubit_estimate: fell from ~20M to under 1M qubits (2025 research)
threat_context.note: Harvest-now-decrypt-later means data captured today is at risk the day a CRQC arrives.

default_deadline_policy.note: Default deadlines applied ONLY when a CBOM carries no deadline of its own. A coarse asset class is mapped to a mandated calendar year. Override per your jurisdiction and obligations.
